results.rendered_html:
kṛṣṭa a. [kṛṣ karmāṇi kta]
1 Drawn, pulled, dragged, attracted &c.
2 Ploughed;  Pt. 1. 47. 
Comp.
— upta a. sown on cultivated ground.
— pacya,
— pākya a.
1 ripening in cultivated. ground; cf. akṛṣṭapacya.
2 cultivated.
— phalaṃ the product of a harvest.
